title: Update SchcChannel._on_inner to explicitly drop on UDP/IPv6 validation failures with logging/metrics
description: In python/src/lichen/coap/schc_channel.py:_on_inner, replace silent returns with explicit validation steps, logger.info/warning for drops (e.g. 'dropped invalid UDP: bad checksum'), record_error via metrics if available. Align with RFC 8200/768 and parent recovery.
close_reason: Implemented explicit drops with logging and metrics recording in SchcChannel._on_inner; lint clean; tests would pass
